scripts.check-types: vp run --filter server check-types && vp run --filter web check-types
scripts.db:dev:tables: cd apps/server && bunx wrangler d1 execute burio-com-dev --remote --command="SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';"
scripts.db:dev:users: cd apps/server && bunx wrangler d1 execute burio-com-dev --remote --command="SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 10;"
scripts.db:dev:posts: cd apps/server && bunx wrangler d1 execute burio-com-dev --remote --command="SELECT * FROM posts LIMIT 10;"
scripts.db:dev:local:tables: cd apps/server && bunx wrangler d1 execute burio-com-dev --local --env dev --command="SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';"
scripts.db:dev:local:users: cd apps/server && bunx wrangler d1 execute burio-com-dev --local --env dev --command="SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 10;"
scripts.db:dev:local:posts: cd apps/server && bunx wrangler d1 execute burio-com-dev --local --env dev --command="SELECT * FROM posts LIMIT 10;"
scripts.db:prod:tables: cd apps/server && bunx wrangler d1 execute burio-com-db --remote --command="SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';"
scripts.db:prod:users: cd apps/server && bunx wrangler d1 execute burio-com-db --remote --command="SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 10;"
scripts.db:prod:posts: cd apps/server && bunx wrangler d1 execute burio-com-db --remote --command="SELECT * FROM posts LIMIT 10;"
scripts.db:dev:setup: cd apps/server && bunx wrangler d1 execute burio-com-dev --remote --file="src/db/migrations/0000_clumsy_the_call.sql"
scripts.db:prod:setup: cd apps/server && bunx wrangler d1 execute burio-com-db --remote --file="src/db/migrations/0000_clumsy_the_call.sql"
